testcase.name: test_block_manual_move_to_project_onboarded
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_sales_board_stages.py:266: in setup assert login_res.status_code == 200, f"Sales login failed: {login_res.text}" E AssertionError: Sales login failed: {"detail":"Too many login attempts. Please wait a minute."} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_sales_user_sees_full_phone
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_sales_board_stages.py:331: in test_sales_user_sees_full_phone assert login_res.status_code == 200, f"Sales login failed: {login_res.text}" E AssertionError: Sales login failed: {"detail":"Too many login attempts. Please wait a minute."} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
